name: Edward J Kone
message: Edward J. Kone, P.A. is a law firm focused on providing legal services in criminal defense, traffic violations, and personal injury cases. The firm, led by experienced trial attorneys Edward J. Kone and Gregg D. Kone, aims to offer high-quality representation at reasonable fees while prioritizing the needs of their clients. They serve clients throughout South Florida, particularly in Palm Beach, Miami-Dade, and Broward Counties, and are dedicated to winning cases, often offering free consultations. Their practice areas include handling various misdemeanors and felonies, traffic infractions, DUI cases, and personal injury lawsuits
